name: shiva-scm
description: SHIVA SCM — Enterprise Supply Chain Management Platform

scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run copy:frontend && npm run install:backend
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.copy:frontend: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const src='frontend/dist';const dest='backend/public';if(fs.existsSync(dest))fs.rmSync(dest,{recursive:true});fs.cpSync(src,dest,{recursive:true});console.log('✅ Frontend copied to backend/public');"

author: Shiva Consultancy Group
